tasks.label: convert-smoke-output
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; Get-Content tools/last_smoke_output.txt | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/last_smoke_output_utf8.txt

tasks.label: probe-health-file
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5678/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "STATUS=$($r.StatusCode)" | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt } catch { "STATUS=DOWN`n$($_.Exception.Message)" | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt }

tasks.label: probe-health-file-2
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5678/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; ('STATUS=' + $r.StatusCode) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt } catch { $msg = 'STATUS=DOWN'; if ($_.Exception -and $_.Exception.Message) { $msg = $msg + "`n" + $_.Exception.Message }; $msg | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt }

tasks.label: probe-health-file-3
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5678/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; ('STATUS=' + $r.StatusCode) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt } catch { 'STATUS=DOWN' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt }

tasks.label: smoke-admin-file-2
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/smoke_admin_endpoints.py | Out-File -FilePath tools/last_smoke_output.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: smoke-admin-file-3
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/smoke_admin_endpoints.py | Out-File -FilePath tools/last_smoke_output.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: probe-health-file-4
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5678/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; ('STATUS=' + $r.StatusCode) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt } catch { 'STATUS=DOWN' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt }

tasks.label: check-port-5678
tasks.command: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5678 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($null -eq $conns -or $conns.Count -eq 0) { 'LISTENING=NO' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/port_5678.txt } else { 'LISTENING=YES' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/port_5678.txt; $conns | Select-Object -Property LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | ConvertTo-Json | Add-Content langgraph_agent/tools/port_5678.txt }

tasks.label: inspect-process-21980
tasks.command: $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=21980"; if ($p) { "PID=$($p.ProcessId)" | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/process_21980.txt; "Name=$($p.Name)" | Add-Content langgraph_agent/tools/process_21980.txt; "CommandLine=$($p.CommandLine)" | Add-Content langgraph_agent/tools/process_21980.txt } else { 'MISSING' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/process_21980.txt }

tasks.label: inspect-process-21980-v2
tasks.command: $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId=21980'; if ($p) { $p | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/process_21980.txt } else { 'MISSING' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/process_21980.txt }

tasks.label: probe-health-latency
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:5678/health' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $sw.Stop(); ('STATUS=' + $r.StatusCode + ';MS=' + [int]$sw.ElapsedMilliseconds) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt } catch { $sw.Stop(); ('STATUS=DOWN;MS=' + [int]$sw.ElapsedMilliseconds) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 tools/health_probe.txt }

tasks.label: bootstrap-phase3-verify
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/bootstrap_phase3_mysql_tables.py | Out-File -FilePath tools/bootstrap_phase3_output.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: check-bootstrap-process
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*bootstrap_phase3_mysql_tables.py*' } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/bootstrap_proc.txt

tasks.label: isolated-admin-smoke-run
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/isolated_admin_smoke.py | Out-File -FilePath tools/isolated_admin_smoke_output.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: check-isolated-smoke-proc
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*isolated_admin_smoke.py*' } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json | Out-File -FilePath langgraph_agent/tools/isolated_smoke_proc.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: direct-db-profile-check
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import asyncio; from database.retrieval_modes import get_retrieval_profile; print(asyncio.run(get_retrieval_profile('public','default')))"

tasks.label: factory-kwargs-sanity
factory-kwargs-sanity-2
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from llm.factory import _instantiate; X=type('X',(object,),{'__init__':lambda self, **kwargs: setattr(self,'kw',kwargs)}); obj=_instantiate(X, model='m1', api_key='k1', temperature=0.0); print(obj.kw)"

tasks.label: factory-kwargs-to-file
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from llm.factory import _instantiate; X=type('X',(object,),{'__init__':lambda self, **kwargs: setattr(self,'kw',kwargs)}); obj=_instantiate(X, model='m1', api_key='k1', temperature=0.0); open('tools/factory_sanity.txt','w',encoding='utf-8').write(str(obj.kw))"

tasks.label: isolated-admin-smoke-run-2
tasks.command: Set-Location langgraph_agent; c:/Users/ABDULLAH/OneDrive/Desktop/YouBot/.venv/Scripts/python.exe tools/isolated_admin_smoke.py | Out-File -FilePath tools/isolated_admin_smoke_output.txt -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: isolated-proc-dump
tasks.command: $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'Name="python.exe"' | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*isolated_admin_smoke.py*' }; if ($procs) { $procs | Select-Object ProcessId,Name,CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/isolated_proc_dump.txt } else { 'NONE' | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 langgraph_agent/tools/isolated_proc_dump.txt }
